chapter_title.ar: باب فَضْلِ التِّجَارَةِ وَ الْمُوَاظَبَةِ عَلَيْهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 53 – The Preference of the business and the attentiveness over it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/129)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/129)

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ibn Bukeyr, from the one who narrated it,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The business increases in the intellect’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from ibn Bukayr from those who narrated to him who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Doing business increases one’s power of reason.’”
